data.title: $1B Bitcoin Deal: Basel Medical’s Unconventional Treasury Strategy
data.description:

Instead of just expanding clinics or launching new health services, it’s preparing to add a massive $1 billion in Bitcoin to its corporate treasury. The $1B Bitcoin healthcare investment by Basel is turning heads, especially since most moves like this come.

data.title: Where Will Solana Price Go After Breaking $200 Resistance?
data.description:
Key Insights: Solana (SOL) price has captured significant market attention, surging over 70% from its $100 support level to test the crucial $185 resistance zone. With technical analysts identifying several indicators pointing to a possible breakout, investors are looking at the possibility for price to rally from $200 to $350.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/05/16/where-will-solana-price-go-after-breaking-200-resistance/

data.title: U.S. Stablecoin Legislation May Advance Despite Recent Setbacks
data.description: According to Foresight News, Republican Senator Bill Hagerty and Democratic Senator Kirsten Gillibrand have indicated that despite recent challenges, the U.S. legislation aimed at regulating stablecoin issuers, known as the Guiding and Establishing Nationwide Innovation for U.S. Stablecoins Act (GENIUS), may enter the debate and approval phase next week.

data.title: Dormant wallet nets $2.4M in 4 hours with high-leverage altcoin shorts
data.description:
17-5-2025 – An address that had lain dormant for four years has re-emerged to capitalise on a widespread downturn in altcoins, as reported by Lookonchain. The investor behind this address executed a series of bold leveraged short positions on HyperLiquid, including a 25x short order on Ethereum (ETH), alongside 10x leveraged shorts on PEPE, WIF, [. .
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/dormant-wallet-nets-2-4m-in-4-hours-with-high-leverage-altcoin-shorts/

data.title: The suspected team address has transferred 6.7 million LDO to CEX in the past 20 hours, and 17.81 million LDO has been transferred to CEX in the past 4 days
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of Chain Embers, the address suspected to belong to the Lido team has transferred 6.7 million LDO (about 6.61 million US dollars) to Binance, OKX, Bybit, and Gate in the past 24 hours. This organization or team has transferred a total of 17.81 million LDO (about 18.14 million US dollars) to CEX in the past 4 days. The price of LDO has also fallen from $1.16 to the current $0.93 during this period, a drop of 20%.

data.title: CatFee launches energy leasing and purchasing services to help users save on Tron chain transaction costs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News It is reported that the Web3 energy service platform CatFee has officially launched the energy leasing and energy purchasing functions, focusing on the energy market in the Tron ecosystem. The platform aims to provide users with a convenient resource leasing solution to reduce bandwidth and handling fee consumption during smart contract calls. CatFee said that users can rent energy through the platform to offset transaction costs without staking TRX for a long time, and can also directly purchase energy for use. The platform supports energy sublease and energy quick charge, striving to provide a transparent and efficient user experience. At present, CatFee has supported multiple wallet access methods, and has published detailed operation guides and safety instructions on the official website for users to review.

data.description:
Bitcoin temporarily surged following false ETF news hack by Eric Council, prompting SEC's security review.
source: https://coincu.com/338029-hacker-sentenced-fake-bitcoin-etf

data.title: Paraguay deports three undocumented immigrants after crypto mining theft attempt
data.description:
Paraguayan law enforcement has deported three individuals and arrested another for attempting to steal crypto miners at a facility near the country’s Itaipu hydroelectric dam. According to a May 15 statement from Paraguayan prosecutor Irene Rolón, the men were caught by police soon after breaking into a locked section of Teratech SA’s facility in Coronel Bogado, leading to their arrest. Prosecutors believe the men may have had ties to Teratech as independent contractors, but are still waiting on official confirmation from the company’s CEO. The three deported were Chinese nationals Jinping Duan, Tian Jianyun and Zheng Guanglong, who did not have official entry records into the country
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/paraguay-deports-three-illegal-immigrants-after-crypto-mining-theft-attempt?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Bitcoin futures market shows signs of maturity amid price surge, Glassnode reports
data.description:
17-5-2025 – Fresh data from analytics firm Glassnode reveals a remarkably balanced trading landscape, despite Bitcoin’s robust price surge. The perpetual futures market has maintained its composure, with funding rates hovering at a measured 0. 007% – yielding an annualised figure of 7. 6%
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/bitcoin-futures-market-shows-signs-of-maturity-amid-price-surge-glassnode-reports/

data.title: 25x short ETH address has made a profit of $2.4 million after being dormant for 4 years
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, as the market led to a general decline in altcoins, the address that previously spent $2.95 million to open a 25x ETH short order on HyperLiquid, as well as 10x leveraged PEPE, WIF and OP short orders, has made a floating profit of $2.4 million in less than 4 hours. It is worth noting that before this high-multiple short operation, the address had been silent for 4 years.

data.title: Ethereum exchange reserves drop by 300,000 ETH as bullish momentum builds toward $2,665 resistance
data.description:
17-5-2025 – Ethereum (ETH) has witnessed a significant shift in market dynamics, with its reserves on Binance dwindling from 4. 1 million ETH to 3. 9 million ETH since mid-April 2025—a reduction of 300,000 ETH. This decline reflects a growing trend among investors to prioritise long-term holding and decentralised protocols, easing the sell-side pressure typically exerted by [
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/ethereum-exchange-reserves-drop-by-300000-eth-as-bullish-momentum-builds-toward-2665-resistance/

data.title: Bitcoin Futures Funding Rates Remain Neutral Amid Price Surge
data.description: According to Foresight News, Glassnode has reported that despite a significant increase in Bitcoin's price, the funding rates for perpetual futures have remained at a neutral level of approximately 0.007%, which translates to an annualized rate of 7.6%. This indicates that long positions are still relatively moderate. The derivatives market appears to be catching up with the spot market, and the limited leverage suggests that this trend is healthy and sustainable.

data.title: Gate Alpha has been launched on KEKIUS, KORI, buidl, APU, FARTSIGHT
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Gate Alpha has now listed Kekius Maximus (KEKIUS), Kori The Pom (KORI), buidl (buidl), Apu Apustaja (APU) and FARTSIGHT (FARTSIGHT), and you can trade them by entering the APP.
Gate Alpha now supports popular public chains such as SOL, ETH, BNB Chain and Base. Users can use USDT in their spot accounts to directly purchase popular assets on the chain without manually changing chains, recharging or authorizing.
